entry.title: New: BILL044(25) (Honolulu) — CC-181(25) - Bill re-referred from Zoning, to Zoning & Planning Committee.
entry.content:
RELATING TO AFFORDABLE RENTAL HOUSING.

Amends ROH Section 32-2.2, by establishing affordable rental housing projects as a permitted use in business zoning districts.

Latest action: CC-181(25) - Bill re-referred from Zoning, to Zoning & Planning Committee.

View on the council site
